valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Tue 02 Jun 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Wed 03 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low west Atlantic 994, moving rapidly east, expected Rockall 985 by 0600 tomorrow. Lows Cromarty 998 and Rockall 998 losing their identities
